'''hajaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noctilionid|noctilionid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noctilionid|noctilionid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hajaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjæjæth|hæjæjæth]] || [[word:hæjæjæj|hæjæjæj]] || [[word:hæjæjæsh|hæjæjæsh]] || [[word:hæjæjæ|hæjæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajajajath|hajajajath]] || [[word:hajajajaj|hajajajaj]] || [[word:hajajajash|hajajajash]] || [[word:hajajaja|hajajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajajath|hajajath]] || [[word:hajajaj|hajajaj]] || [[word:hajajash|hajajash]] || [[word:hajaja|hajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajafjath|hajafjath]] || [[word:hajafjaj|hajafjaj]] || [[word:hajafjash|hajafjash]] || [[word:hajafjaf|hajafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajajatha|hajajatha]] || [[word:hajajaja|hajajaja]] || [[word:hajajasha|hajajasha]] || [[word:hajajaka|hajajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajajath|hajajath]] || [[word:hajajaj|hajajaj]] || [[word:hajajash|hajajash]] || [[word:hajaja|hajaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajajathal|hajajathal]] || [[word:hajajajal|hajajajal]] || [[word:hajajashal|hajajashal]] || [[word:hajajakal|hajajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajajathatha|hajajathatha]] || [[word:hajajajaja|hajajajaja]] || [[word:hajajashasha|hajajashasha]] || [[word:hajajaka|hajajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajajathan|hajajathan]] || [[word:hajajajan|hajajajan]] || [[word:hajajashan|hajajashan]] || [[word:hajajakan|hajajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajajathaoro|hajajathaoro]] || [[word:hajajajaoro|hajajajaoro]] || [[word:hajajashaoro|hajajashaoro]] || [[word:hajajakaoro|hajajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
